project.focus: Integrating Agentic Upgrades (LSP, Patching, Reactive Memory)

tasks.description: Standardize Preflight blocks across all Claude and Gemini agents (e.g., `devops_engineer`, `vibe_sentinel`). Force them to strictly read ONLY `DIGEST.md` and `UPDATE.md` upon initialization. Redundant full-folder ingestions during Tier 3 multi-agent handovers must be eliminated.
tasks.summary: Standardized preflight blocks across devops_engineer, security_engineer, decision_recorder, claude_tasks agents — removed UPDATE.md references, enforced DIGEST-first pattern, moved domain files to JIT sections; Gemini agents already compliant

tasks.description: Deprecate `UPDATE.md` globally across the AI-OS framework. Remove all dependencies on `UPDATE.md` from `src/bin/ai`, templates (`src/templates`), agent preflights, and skills (like `ai-update`, `ai-preflight`, `ai-review`). Delete `UPDATE.md` from the standard scaffolding and ensure it is never created.
tasks.summary: Deprecated UPDATE.md globally — removed from ensure_ai_templates() scaffolding, preflight() output, do_update/do_onboard/do_digest prompts, ai-preflight skill, ai-review skill, bug-reproducer skill, GEMINI.md trigger table; refactored ai-update skill to use conversation context; marked ai-update-lifecycle as DEPRECATED no-op

tasks.description: Refactor the `ai update` CLI command. It must no longer read from or rely on `UPDATE.md`. Instead, it should trigger an agent to scan the project (respecting JIT limits) and autonomously update the current project state directly into `.ai/DIGEST.md` and `.ai/state.json`.
tasks.summary: Refactored do_update() in src/bin/ai — removed UPDATE.md dependency and ensure_ai_templates call; now accepts inline intent from CLI args, triggers digest_updater agent (JIT) for DIGEST refresh, and directs task-synchronizer-mcp for state.json updates

tasks.description: Refactor all MCP servers currently relying on `UPDATE.md`. Deprecate or redesign `intent-refiner-mcp`. Update `task-synchronizer-mcp`, `risk-analyzer-mcp`, and `github-bridge-mcp` to process intent directly from CLI inputs, chat histories, or API requests, fully excising `UPDATE.md` references.
tasks.summary: Removed UPDATE.md from all three MCP servers: orchestrator-mcp (removed UPDATE.md preflight pointer, deprecated run_intent_cleanup as no-op), task-synchronizer-mcp (deprecated sync_tasks to return deprecation notice without reading UPDATE.md), github-bridge-mcp (renamed create_update_from_issues→create_intent_from_issues, fixed schema/handler name mismatch bug, removed UPDATE.md writes)

tasks.description: Propagate the "AIS: Fresh Conversations" token economics rule into the core `src/templates/RULES.md` and `src/templates/architect.md.template` files, so that all new AI-OS scaffoldings enforce the use of `/clear` between unrelated tasks to prevent exponential token bloat.
tasks.summary: Added AIS Fresh Conversations rule + 6-file JIT limit to src/templates/RULES.md; added §33 Token Economics section to src/templates/architect.md.template; synced RULES.md to .ai/RULES.md

tasks.description: Implement Architectural Fragmentation (§39). Split the monolithic `.ai/architect.md` into granular Domain Blueprints (e.g., `.ai/blueprints/core.md`, `security.md`) to reduce the session-start context tax. Update preflight scripts and templates to read the primary index file and use JIT loading for sub-blueprints. (Fulfills P-61)
tasks.summary: Implemented Architectural Fragmentation (§39) — created .ai/blueprints/ with 5 domain files (core, security, agents, mcp, governance); architect.md reduced from 490+ lines to 35-line lightweight index/router; updated orchestrator-mcp run_preflight pointer and src/templates/architect.md.template with §34 Domain Blueprints pattern

tasks.description: Implement "Metadata-Only" Default Mode for `ai sync` (§29). Ensure `ai sync` only provides Skill Summaries to agents by default, rather than full `SKILL.md` contents. Full skill content should only be injected dynamically via `activate_skill`. Update `context-invoker-mcp` accordingly. (Fulfills P-62)
tasks.summary: Metadata-only default mode for ai sync: added list_skills/list_agents tools to context-invoker-mcp (Level 1 metadata), added _generate_skills_index() to src/bin/ai that writes _SKILLS_INDEX.md (name+description) to each synced skills dir after sync_skills_20()

tasks.description: Refactor `archive-manager-mcp` to use file streams (e.g., `readline`) instead of `readFileSync` and string `split` when counting lines and words for token estimation. Loading full, potentially bloated log files into memory to count words is a robustness flaw and memory/token burner.
tasks.summary: Refactored archive-manager-mcp: replaced readFileSync + string split for line/word counting with readline createInterface streams; added countFileStats() helper — no full file load into memory

tasks.description: Refactor `context-invoker-mcp` to only read the top chunk (e.g., first 4KB or using a stream) of skill/agent files when parsing YAML frontmatter during list operations. Currently, it reads the entire content of every skill and agent into memory just to extract the `description` field, causing massive overhead.
tasks.summary: Refactored context-invoker-mcp: added readHead() helper (openSync/readSync, 4096 bytes max); listAvailable() now uses readHead instead of readFileSync — frontmatter parsing never loads full skill/agent content

tasks.description: Refactor `context-guardian-mcp` to use `git grep` or `ripgrep` via `child_process` when scanning `src/` for TODO/FIXME markers in `strict` mode, instead of recursively reading every source file completely into Node memory. Loading every file fully is a critical performance flaw and memory burner for large codebases.
tasks.summary: Refactored context-guardian-mcp strict mode: replaced scanDir recursive readFileSync loop with git grep -n -E; removed scanDir function + readdirSync/statSync imports; added spawnSync + extname; fixed pre-existing missing relative import

tasks.description: Migrate `task-synchronizer-mcp` state to SQLite to prevent race conditions.
tasks.summary: Handed over to Claude as E-156

tasks.description: Implement fuzzy-patching fallback in `patch-mcp` to reduce retry turns. (See .ai/blueprints/robustness.md)
tasks.summary: Handed over to Claude as E-157

tasks.description: Migrate `task-synchronizer-mcp` state to SQLite to prevent race conditions.
tasks.summary: Migrated task-synchronizer-mcp state to SQLite (node:sqlite, WAL mode): schema covers project/tasks/stamps/deltas/meta tables; auto-imports state.json on first run; _syncFromJsonIfNewer() catches orchestrator-mcp direct writes via mtime guard; all mutations write state.json + TASKS.md + REVIEWS.md as views for backwards compat; updated migrate_state_test.sh to reflect getDb() replacing readStateStrict(); 334/336 tests pass (2 pre-existing e140 failures)

tasks.description: Implement fuzzy-patching fallback in `patch-mcp` to reduce retry turns. (See .ai/blueprints/robustness.md)
tasks.summary: Fuzzy-patching fallback in patch-mcp: on MD5 mismatch, search for old_content in current file; if found exactly once → apply patch + return [PATCH_APPLIED_WITH_DRIFT] with new MD5; if not found or ambiguous → reject with [MD5_MISMATCH]; updated lsp_patch_test.sh to match new error token

tasks.description: Ratify or remediate the `Co-Authored-By` trailer violation from commit d351dc9 (§12 Git Identity mandate).
tasks.summary: Blueprinted in git-remediation.md and handed over to Claude as E-158

tasks.description: Create and execute `scripts/remediate_git_identity.sh` to rewrite commit history and remove unauthorized AI co-author trailers. (See `.ai/blueprints/git-remediation.md`)
tasks.summary: Skipped by user — no action required

tasks.description: Add `maxBuffer` limits (e.g., `10 * 1024 * 1024`) to all `spawnSync` calls across all MCP servers (especially `github-bridge-mcp` and `lsp-mcp`) to prevent Node `ERR_CHILD_PROCESS_STDIO_MAXBUFFER` crashes.
tasks.summary: Handed over to Claude as E-159

tasks.description: Add mandatory YAML frontmatter (`disable-model-invocation`, `user-invocable`, `allowed-tools`) to all Gemini sub-agents in `src/gemini/agents/` to fix `verification-mcp` compliance failures.
tasks.summary: Handed over to Claude as E-160

tasks.description: Add result bounding (e.g., `| head -n 100`) to the `git grep` call in `context-guardian-mcp` to prevent token leakage on massive codebases.
tasks.summary: Handed over to Claude as E-161

tasks.description: Add `maxBuffer` limits (e.g., `10 * 1024 * 1024`) to all `spawnSync` calls across all MCP servers (especially `github-bridge-mcp` and `lsp-mcp`) to prevent Node `ERR_CHILD_PROCESS_STDIO_MAXBUFFER` crashes. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md`)
tasks.summary: Added maxBuffer 10MB to all spawnSync calls: lsp-mcp, github-bridge-mcp, propose-patch-mcp, archive-manager-mcp, orchestrator-mcp, context-guardian-mcp

tasks.description: Add mandatory YAML frontmatter (`disable-model-invocation`, `user-invocable`, `allowed-tools`) to all Gemini sub-agents in `src/gemini/agents/` to fix `verification-mcp` compliance failures. (See `.ai/blueprints/agents.md`)
tasks.summary: Added disable-model-invocation, user-invocable, and allowed-tools frontmatter to all 6 Gemini sub-agents: digest_updater, docs-architect, gemini_tasks, knowledge_architect, memory_curator, ux_reviewer. Tools scoped per least-privilege per agent role.

tasks.description: Add result bounding (e.g., `| head -n 100`) to the `git grep` call in `context-guardian-mcp` to prevent token leakage on massive codebases. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md`)
tasks.summary: Added result bounding to git grep output in context-guardian-mcp via .slice(0, 100) on the split lines array; also added maxBuffer: 10 * 1024 * 1024 to the same spawnSync call (covered by E-159).

tasks.description: Implement a 5000-character bounds limit for `issue.body` in `github-bridge-mcp`'s `get_issue` tool to prevent massive token leaks into the LLM context. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md` section 5)
tasks.summary: Bounded issue.body to 5000 chars in github-bridge-mcp get_issue — appends "... (truncated)" on overflow

tasks.description: Refactor `export_signature` in `memory-manager-mcp` to use a `readHead` helper (similar to `context-invoker-mcp`) instead of fully loading and splitting `architect.md` via `readFileSync`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md` section 6)
tasks.summary: Added readHead() helper (openSync/readSync/closeSync, 4KB) to memory-manager-mcp; export_signature now uses readHead instead of readFileSync for architect_v extraction

tasks.description: Refactor `generateDelta` in `blueprint-aligner-mcp` to use regex or iterative scanning over the `diff` string instead of `.split("\n")` to avoid Node.js OOM risks on massive 10MB diffs. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md` section 7)
tasks.summary: Replaced diff.split("\n").filter() in blueprint-aligner-mcp generateDelta with iterative regex exec loop — avoids full array allocation on large diffs

tasks.description: Optimize `run_preflight` in `orchestrator-mcp` by replacing the `readFileSync(...).split("\n").slice(0, 80)` logic with a more memory-efficient read strategy that avoids full array allocation. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md` section 8)
tasks.summary: Added readBoundedLines() helper to orchestrator-mcp (reads first N*250 bytes via openSync/readSync); run_preflight now uses it instead of readFileSync+split+slice

tasks.description: Fix blueprint extraction in `orchestrator-mcp`'s `run_handover`. It currently only scans the root `architect.md`. Update it to also search `.ai/blueprints/*.md` to correctly attach blueprints generated by E-151 Domain Fragmentation. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md` section 9)
tasks.summary: Fixed run_handover blueprint extraction to scan .ai/blueprints/*.md as fallback when taskId not found in root architect.md (post E-151 fragmentation)

tasks.description: Add a `statSync(abs).size` guard to `patch_file` in `patch-mcp` to fail early with `[FILE_TOO_LARGE]` if the target file exceeds 5MB, preventing blocking I/O freezes on massive assets. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness.md` section 10)
tasks.summary: Added statSync size guard to patch-mcp patch_file — rejects files >5MB with [FILE_TOO_LARGE] before readFileSync

tasks.description: Create `src/mcp/shared/state-db.js` and consolidate SQLite schema. Extract `DatabaseSync` initialization from `task-synchronizer-mcp` to ensure WAL mode and shared access patterns are consistent across all MCP servers. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase2.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Created src/mcp/shared/state-db.js — exports getDb, readState, regenerateViews, nextId; WAL mode + full schema extracted from task-synchronizer-mcp

tasks.description: Refactor `orchestrator-mcp` to use `state-db.js` for SQLite-first state management. Replace `state-writer.js` imports and update `run_handover` and `run_preflight` to query/mutate the SQLite `tasks`, `stamps`, `deltas`, and `meta` tables directly. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase2.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Refactored orchestrator-mcp to use state-db.js — run_preflight reads SQLite directly, run_handover writes task/delta/digest_stale to SQLite; state-writer.js import removed

tasks.description: Refactor `task-synchronizer-mcp` to use `state-db.js`. Remove redundant schema definitions while maintaining the "Backwards Compat View" logic (regenerating `state.json` and Markdown files after SQLite updates). (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase2.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Refactored task-synchronizer-mcp to import getDb/readState/regenerateViews/nextId from state-db.js; removed redundant local definitions

tasks.description: Implement iterative regex scanning in `context-guardian-mcp` to fix the OOM risk in `strict` mode result processing. Replace `.split("\n")` on large `git grep` output with an iterative RegExp `.exec()` loop. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase2.md` section 2)
tasks.summary: Replaced split("\n").slice(0,100) in context-guardian-mcp strict mode with iterative regex exec loop — zero array allocation on large git grep output

tasks.description: Harden `tests/run.sh` to ensure CI-breaking failures are never silent. Capture exit codes of all sub-script runs and fail the master runner if any sub-suite crashes or exits non-zero. Also, add explicit error reporting to `readBoundedLines` in `orchestrator-mcp`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase2.md` section 3)
tasks.summary: Hardened tests/run.sh — crashed suites (no SUITE_RESULT line + non-zero exit) now counted as 1 failure; added stderr logging to readBoundedLines catch block in orchestrator-mcp

tasks.description: Port `stop-hook.sh` and `post-tool-log.sh` to use `sqlite3` CLI for state checks instead of `python3` + `state.json`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase2.md` section 4)
tasks.summary: Ported stop-hook.sh and post-tool-log.sh to use sqlite3 CLI for state checks — removed python3+state.json dependency; stop-hook reads digest_stale/digest_stale_reason from meta table; post-tool-log reads open task count from tasks table with grep fallback

tasks.description: Implement viewport-scoped audits in `vibe-check-mcp`. Limit `querySelectorAll` scans to the first 100 elements or use visibility checks to prevent OOM/freezes on massive pages. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase2.md` section 5)
tasks.summary: Implemented viewport-scoped audits in vibe-check-mcp — all three querySelectorAll scans (contrast, touch targets, focus rings) now filter to getBoundingClientRect() visible elements only (top < innerHeight && bottom > 0) and cap at 100 elements

tasks.description: Implement disk persistence for `propose-patch-mcp`. Store pending patches in a new `patches` SQLite table or `.ai/patches.json` so they survive across CLI sessions. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase3.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Implemented disk persistence for propose-patch-mcp — patches stored in .ai/patches.json; loadPatches() on startup, savePatches() after propose/confirm/reject; applied/rejected patches are pruned; survives CLI session restarts

tasks.description: Harden `safe-exec-mcp` secret detection by broadening the `SECRET_IN_COMMAND` regex to catch space-separated secrets (e.g., `--token secret`). (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase3.md` section 2)
tasks.summary: Hardened safe-exec-mcp SECRET_IN_COMMAND regex to catch space-separated secrets (e.g. --token secret_value) — changed \s*=\s* to (\s*=\s*|\s+) to detect both assignment and flag-style secrets

tasks.description: Add transaction support to `state-db.js` via a `withTransaction` helper and refactor `orchestrator-mcp` to ensure multi-table updates are atomic. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase3.md` section 3)
tasks.summary: Added withTransaction(db, callback) helper to state-db.js (BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK); refactored orchestrator-mcp run_handover to wrap task status update and delta/meta multi-table writes in separate transactions for ACID integrity

tasks.description: Make `vibe-check-mcp` timeouts configurable via an optional `timeout_ms` parameter to prevent false positives on slow local servers. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase3.md` section 4)
tasks.summary: Made vibe-check-mcp timeouts configurable — added optional timeout_ms parameter (default 15000) to run_vibe_audit and run_chaos_test tool schemas; passed through to page.goto() to prevent false positives on slow local servers

tasks.description: Migrate `propose-patch-mcp` to SQLite persistence. Add a `patches` table to `state-db.js` and refactor the MCP server to use it, replacing the race-prone `patches.json`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase4.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Migrated propose-patch-mcp from patches.json to SQLite patches table in state-db.js schema

tasks.description: Implement a research-command whitelist in `safe-exec-mcp` to prevent greedy secret detection from blocking benign commands like `grep`, `find`, and `ls`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase4.md` section 2)
tasks.summary: Added RESEARCH_CMDS whitelist to safe-exec-mcp to prevent false-positive secret detection on read-only commands

tasks.description: Refactor `run_handover` in `orchestrator-mcp` to wrap both the task status update and the implementation delta write in a single unified `withTransaction` block for ACID integrity. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase4.md` section 3)
tasks.summary: Unified run_handover into single withTransaction covering task DONE + delta insert + meta updates; removed dead blueprint scan code

tasks.description: Remove the redundant `_syncFromJsonIfNewer` logic from `task-synchronizer-mcp` to eliminate unnecessary I/O overhead on every tool call. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase4.md` section 4)
tasks.summary: Removed _syncFromJsonIfNewer from task-synchronizer-mcp; SQLite is sole source of truth

tasks.description: Improve SQLite error visibility in `orchestrator-mcp`'s `run_preflight` by replacing the empty `catch` block with explicit error logging to `stderr`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase4.md` section 5)
tasks.summary: Replaced empty catch in run_preflight with stderr warning log for SQLite errors

tasks.description: Refactor `context-guardian-mcp` to use SQLite for health checks. Replace the expensive `TASKS.md` parsing in `check_workspace` with direct SQL queries via `state-db.js`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase5.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Replaced TASKS.md string parsing in context-guardian-mcp with SQLite query for open task detection

tasks.description: Harden `pre-commit.sh` with SQLite checks. Use the `sqlite3` CLI to verify task consistency and remove the redundant comparison between generated markdown views and `state.json`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase5.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Replaced python3+state.json task/stamp count in pre-commit.sh with sqlite3 CLI queries

tasks.description: Standardize all system skills (`ai-archive`, `ai-test`, etc.) to use the `get_state` tool instead of `grep` patterns on `TASKS.md`. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase5.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Updated ai-archive, ai-test, ai-digest skills to use sqlite3 queries instead of grep TASKS.md patterns

tasks.description: Remove the `grep TASKS.md` fallback from `post-tool-log.sh`. Make `sqlite3` the exclusive source of truth for logic checks in system hooks. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase5.md` section 2)
tasks.summary: Removed grep TASKS.md fallback from post-tool-log.sh; added [MISSING_DEP] warning when sqlite3 unavailable

tasks.description: Port the `task_validator` agent to SQLite. Update its instructions to use `get_state` instead of loading the full `TASKS.md` into context. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase5.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Updated task_validator agent to use get_state() via task-synchronizer-mcp with TASKS.md fallback

tasks.description: Restore mandatory YAML frontmatter to all 6 Gemini sub-agents in `src/gemini/agents/`. Authorize specific toolsets per agent role to satisfy `verification-mcp` compliance. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase6.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Restored YAML frontmatter (disable-model-invocation, user-invocable, allowed-tools) to all 6 Gemini sub-agents with least-privilege toolsets

tasks.description: Align `CAPABILITIES.md` with current SQLite paths. Add explicit READ/WRITE permissions for `~/.ai-os/*.sqlite` and READ for the config registry to prevent `ai-exec` warnings. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase6.md` section 2)
tasks.summary: Added ~/.ai-os/*.sqlite to filesystem.read and filesystem.write in CAPABILITIES.md with explanatory note

tasks.description: Audit MCP servers (`vibe-check-mcp`, `lsp-mcp`, `task-synchronizer-mcp`) for resource leaks. Ensure all external process handles and database connections are closed in `finally` blocks. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase6.md` section 3)
tasks.summary: Fixed per-iteration context leak in vibe-check-mcp runVibeAudit by wrapping each context in a try/finally block

tasks.description: Harden the installer and `ai install` logic. Ensure path injection is idempotent and implement a more dynamic strategy for cleaning up deprecated v2 configuration files. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase6.md` section 3)
tasks.summary: Replaced hardcoded ORPHANS list in install-ai-os.sh with dynamic purge_orphans() function covering contracts/, claude/, gemini/

tasks.description: Implement explicit delta acknowledgment in `orchestrator-mcp`. Stop marking implementation deltas as read automatically during `run_preflight`. Add a `mark_deltas_read` tool so the Architect can confirm incorporation manually. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase7.md` section 1)
tasks.summary: Removed auto-read from run_preflight; added mark_deltas_read tool to task-synchronizer-mcp for explicit Architect acknowledgment

tasks.description: Harden `run_vibe_audit` in `vibe-check-mcp` against single-route failures. Add an inner `try...catch` loop so that a timeout or 404 on one route doesn't crash the entire audit session. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase7.md` section 2)
tasks.summary: Added inner try/catch per route in runVibeAudit; FAULT routes are recorded and reported without aborting the full audit

tasks.description: Integrate `report_cost` into the Triad workflow. Add directives to specialized agents (Security, DevOps) to report token usage via `token-budget-mcp` after completing high-tier tasks. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase7.md` section 3)
tasks.summary: Added report_cost directives to security_engineer and devops_engineer agents for Tier 2/3 tasks

tasks.description: Add normalization to `safe-exec-mcp` to resist basic command obfuscation (like quoted strings). Strip quotes and escapes from the command buffer before running the secret detection regex. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase7.md` section 4)
tasks.summary: Added normalizeForSecretScan() to safe-exec-mcp stripping quote concatenation and backslash escapes before SECRET_IN_COMMAND regex

tasks.description: Fix the `mkdirSync` race condition in `token-budget-mcp` and ensure robust initial SQLite creation in high-concurrency environments. (See `.ai/blueprints/robustness_phase7.md` section 4)
tasks.summary: Fixed token-budget-mcp getDb() to only cache connection after full schema setup; added stderr warning on init failure
